bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (t1_id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (t1_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
INSERT INTO t2 (t1_id, value) SELECT id, ROUND(RAND() * 100, 2) FROM t1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 't1';
